Order • Menu • Directions
iPhone + Android friendly

Flux & Crave, built for the phone in your hand.

Free to install and free to use: fast menu browsing, one-tap ordering, call, directions, and save-for-later cravings in a clean mobile web app.

Order now Call Flux & Crave

No paid download. No subscription. On iPhone: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen. On Android: tap Install App when prompted.

OrderJump into online ordering. MenuBrowse the full crave lineup. CallReach the shop in one tap. DirectionsOpen maps for pickup.
Crave builder

Find the item that matches your mood.

Search or filter the menu, then order when the craving gets loud.

Today's push

What makes it different?

Use today's social angle to show the clean crave lane: bold flavor, intentional ingredients, and visuals that people remember.

Free app

Order, call, directions — all in one place.

Free to install and free to use. Perfect for stories, QR cards, counter signage, and repeat customers.
